title: lepidium lasiocarpum subsp. palmeri
intro: Lepidium lasiocarpum subsp. palmeri, also known as Palmer's peppergrass or wild peppergrass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepidium lasiocarpum subsp. palmeri include reducing pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tincture, tea, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
